summary: Restructured opening paragraph from document-centered scaffold to character/spatial anchor to differentiate from Chapter 7's document-arrival opening. Entry continuity from Chapter 5 and exit continuity to Chapter 7 were already clean and required no changes. Note: Chapter 7 references designation K-4471 while Chapter 6 establishes the revised designation K-4471-R; this is a potential cross-chapter issue for Chapter 7's seam pass.
edits: Rewrote opening from 'The classification documents were seventy-three pages long.' (document-centered) to 'Mira stood on the 2/3 train heading home...' (character/spatial anchor) to avoid matching Chapter 7's document-arrival scaffold
Moved seventy-three-page detail into a short punchy second sentence within the opening paragraph
Changed 'download bar' to 'progress bar' and 'When it completed' to 'When the download completed' to maintain clarity after restructuring
